mnemonics: Class is like a blueprint or template for creating objects
Components of a class include variables, methods, and constructors
keyPoints: A package is a collection of related classes, interfaces, and other types
Importing a package allows you to use its classes and members in your own program
Member access modifiers (public, private, protected) determine the accessibility of a class member
Constructors are special methods used to initialize objects when they are created
You can use the 'import' keyword to bring a package into scope
